post_id: string not null
platform: string not null
url: string not null
account: struct<platform: string, handle: string, display_name: string, verified: bool> not null
  child 0, platform: string
  child 1, handle: string
  child 2, display_name: string
  child 3, verified: bool
author_display_name: string
text: string not null
language: string
published_at: timestamp[us, tz=UTC] not null
extracted_at: timestamp[us, tz=UTC] not null
engagement: struct<likes: int64, comments: int64, shares: int64, views: int64> not null
  child 0, likes: int64
  child 1, comments: int64
  child 2, shares: int64
  child 3, views: int64
is_repost: bool not null
is_reply: bool not null
parent_post_id: string
content_hash: string not null
actor_run_id: string not null
ingestion_run_id: string not null
schema_version: int64 not null
source_type: string not null
tenant_id: string
